description: Middle Eastern criminal organization based in South-Western Sydney, Australia, founded in 2007 by Bassam Hamzy. Involved in drug trafficking, violence, and gang wars, notably with the Alameddine crime network. Active in Sydney and Melbourne.

country_links.evidence_quote: the gang was also spreading to Adelaide in South Australia
country_links.context: The gang is spreading to Adelaide in South Australia and has a Melbourne faction.
